title: MoreFruits - a MineMinenoMi Addon
description: A JJK × Dragon Ball Z crossover mod for Minecraft 1.16.5 built on Mine Mine no Mi.
body:
🍈 Devil Fruits
Limitless No Mi (Jujutsu Kaisen)
Harness the cursed techniques of the Limitless. Manipulate space itself to repel, attract, and obliterate.

Infinity — activate an invisible barrier that halts all incoming projectiles and cancels damage
Lapse: Blue — compress space to pull targets toward you
Reverse: Red — diverge space to blast enemies away
Hollow: Purple — combine Blue and Red into a void that erases everything in its path
Maximum Blue — amplified attraction singularity
Black Flash — land a perfect strike with cursed energy for 2× damage
Reverse Cursed Technique — regenerate health
Infinite Void — Domain Expansion: trap enemies inside a reality-warping black concrete dome, paralyzing all who enter

Saiyan No Mi (Dragon Ball Z)
Unlock the power of a Saiyan warrior. Fight harder, fly faster, and burn through food twice as fast.

Ki Blast — rapid energy projectiles
Ki Beam — charged devastation beam
Ki Imbued Fists — melee hits launch shockwave bursts and deal 2× damage
Kaioken — multiply your power at a cost
Super Saiyan — golden transformation with a full animated aura

Shrine No Mi (Jujutsu Kaisen)
Wield the cursed techniques of Ryomen Sukuna, the King of Curses.

Cleave — adaptive slash that scales with the target's toughness
Dismantle — raw cutting force
Spiderweb — binding slash
Fuga — "Wind, open" — massive wind blast
World Cutting — cross-shaped slash that shreds anything in its path
Malevolent Shrine — Domain Expansion: Cleave and Dismantle the entire surrounding area
